LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ABRAHAM CRUZ AND ROMEL FLORES'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PENALTIES UNDER CALIFORNIA LABOR CODE SECTION 2698, ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING AND NOTICE HAVING BEEN PROVIDED TO LWDA, THE COURT APPROVES THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, INCLUDING THE SETTLEMENT OF THE PAGA CLAIMS. (SEE LAB. CODE, 2699(S). calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Settlement Of Plaintiffs' Claim For Penalties Under California Labor Code Section 2698, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs Abraham Cruz and Romel Flores's unopposed Motion For Approval Of Settlement Of Plaintiffs' Claim For Penalties Under California Labor Code Section 2698, Et Seq. is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and notice having been provided to LWDA, the court approves the parties' settlement agreement, including the settlement of the PAGA claims. (See Lab. Code, 2699(s).)

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
